subject: refactor(debug): use DaisyUI className tokens directly, remove JS color maps and useTheme()
body:
The intermediate DEBUG_SEVERITY_COLOR_KEYS / DEBUG_SOURCE_COLOR_KEYS maps in themeColors.ts
were unnecessary indirection — DaisyUI className tokens (bg-error, text-primary, etc.) can be
applied directly via className, eliminating the need to resolve hex colors through useTheme().

- Replace SEVERITY_COLORS/SOURCE_COLORS hex maps with className maps (SEVERITY_BG, SEVERITY_TEXT, SOURCE_TEXT)
- Remove useTheme() call from DebugPill — all colors now via className
- Remove all color prop drilling (textColor, subtextColor, colors) from LogRow, EnvTab, PwaDiagnosticsTab
- Remove DEBUG_SEVERITY_COLOR_KEYS and DEBUG_SOURCE_COLOR_KEYS from themeColors.ts
- Reduce StyleSheet from 11 entries to 4 (container, panel, contentInner, logRow)
- Convert remaining inline text styles (fontSize, color) to className equivalents

Tags: refactor, debug, daisyui, tailwind, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-integration
Semver: patch
